name: No-Name-Yet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes.
2. Mix together 1/2 cup chopped onion, 1/2 teaspoon celery seed, 4 hard-boiled eggs, 2 tablespoons juice from drained tomatoes, and 2 tablespoons dill relish. If the mixture is too soupy, add some crushed saltine crackers.
3. For the sauce: Beat mayonnaise and mustard together well. Gradually add olive oil while continuously beating. Add all other ingredients one at a time, continuing to beat after each addition until thoroughly combined.
4. Combine the prepared salad with the sauce and toss to coat evenly.
